sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lungdam thu zeel sak un mi omna citengah
Mihing lungsim omna mihing gal tamna-ah
Tapidaw leii khempeuh Lungdam thugen sak un
Huhpa hong pai khin ta!

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Huhpa hong pai khin ta! Huhpa hong pai khin ta
Vantung Kha Siangtho pen Pa'n piak ding hong ciam pen
Lungdam thu zeel sak un mi omna citengah
Huhpa hong pai khin ta!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zan hun saupi beita zingkhua hong vaak zo ta
Lungsim vangikpi teng hehna hu ging veng ta
Ni taang khammual panin hong suah khiat tak ciangin
Huhpa hong pai khin ta!

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A kha sung zatui tawh kumpite' To hatpa'n
Thongkia kha khempeuh tung hong puak hotkhiat kicing
Thong pi hawm sung tengah zawhna lapi hong ging
Huhpa hong pai khin ta!

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Gen zawh lo itna siang! ka leii in bang ci-in
Gen zawh loh hehpihna mi vak vai tung gen ding
Amah leh A meel taang sungah ka om theih na'ng
Huhpa hong pai khin ta!
